text.title: AI Feature Progressive Rollout Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the playbook-step artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces this contract before the artefact is accepted.

example.code: { "step_id": "ai-feature-progressive-rollout-step-1", "preconditions": ["upstream artefact present"], "actions": ["apply rule set"], "postconditions": ["validated output emitted"], "exit_signal": "downstream step trigger", "owner": "team@example.com" }

example.note: Missing required fields per the schema above.

forbidden.pattern: playbook step without preconditions or postconditions
exit_signal missing — downstream agent cannot know when to start

allowed-transformations.transformation: Auto-populate timestamps from the validation moment.
Normalise enum casing to schema lowercase.
